name: The Entrance To Hell's Kitchen
description:
As you walk in, you wonder why it is so dark here...  And then you realize
either that the electric company is too afraid to come and repair the lights or
because the people here are too poor to afford lights.  You sense the
tremendous evil that lurks within and decide that your personal safety is more
important than exploring...  Besides you can think of at least of a dozen
better places you'd rather be than in Hell's Kitchen.  You decide that the only
real exit is to First Avenue which is to the east.
